title: Monday rearranged all my subitems

posts.author: lucasm (Lucas Martinez)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is so annoying and frustrating.

All my items have subitems and all of the subitems have a particular order.

Out of nowhere, Monday just rearranged the order for all of my subitems. Nobody sorted them out because the order doesn’t even make sense alphabetically or whatsoever.

I read here and there about workflow and in the end I find myself trusting this unstable app.
